styleNotes.cleanroom: Original TopoPass driver-training atlas treatment; example references used for high-level reading goals only.
styleNotes.majorRoads: OSM A-road refs and trunk/primary roads render with thick dark casing, orange fill, large road labels, and route shields.
styleNotes.bRoads: OSM B-road refs and secondary roads render with strong yellow fill and route shields.
styleNotes.minorRoads: Residential, unclassified, service, and minor roads remain thin but named where source labels and collision rules allow.
styleNotes.oneWay: One-way roads use long light-pink directional arrows following OSM oneway and roundabout direction logic.
styleNotes.noEntry: Explicit access/vehicle/motor_vehicle/motorcar=no roads use thick red overlays and no-entry bar markers.
